mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.customer_id, a.project_id, a.asset_type, a.asset_id, a.bind_date, a.unbind_date, a.is_current, a.create_by, a.create_time, c.customer_name, CASE WHEN a.asset_type = 1 THEN r.room_alias WHEN a.asset_type = 2 THEN ps.space_code ELSE '' END as asset_name FROM resi_customer_asset a LEFT JOIN resi_customer c ON a.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN resi_room r ON a.asset_type = 1 AND a.asset_id = r.id LEFT JOIN resi_parking_space ps ON a.asset_type = 2 AND a.asset_id = ps.id WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY a.is_current DESC, a.bind_date DESC

SELECT a.id, a.customer_id, a.project_id, a.asset_type, a.asset_id, a.bind_date, a.unbind_date, a.is_current, a.create_by, a.create_time, c.customer_name, CASE WHEN a.asset_type = 1 THEN r.room_alias WHEN a.asset_type = 2 THEN ps.space_code ELSE '' END as asset_name FROM resi_customer_asset a LEFT JOIN resi_customer c ON a.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN resi_room r ON a.asset_type = 1 AND a.asset_id = r.id LEFT JOIN resi_parking_space ps ON a.asset_type = 2 AND a.asset_id = ps.id WHERE a.asset_type = #{assetType} AND a.asset_id = #{assetId} AND a.is_current = 1 LIMIT 1
